_comment: INC-19 type-contract for int_bullpen_ali_by_season (E11.1-W8a). Derived from the live BETTING.INT_BULLPEN_ALI_BY_SEASON schema (2026-06-29). double_pinned = FLOAT cols the DuckDB branch casts ::double in its TYPE-PIN block so the S3 parquet / lakehouse_ext type is stable across upstream NUMBER<->FLOAT flips.
